programmes.show_description: Thriller with Joel Edgerton and Sigourney Weaver. A horticulturist's ordered life is thrown into chaos when he takes on an apprentice. As dark secrets surface, rules are about to be broken (2022).
How news bulletins used to look. The GREAT! network takes you back in time, remembering stories from this week back then.
Thriller with Joel Edgerton and Sigourney Weaver. A horticulturist's ordered life is thrown into chaos when he takes on an apprentice. As dark secrets surface, rules are about to be broken (2022).
A gang led by Morgan Travis is planning to steal the Crown Jewels and replace Mannering with his exact double.
A gang robbing the Crown Jewels force Mannering to assist them.
Disaster film starring Sebastian Spence. When a deadly jet stream vortex unleashes tornadoes over Manhattan, a race begins to stop the storm before the city is torn apart. (2008)
The Westpac rescue crew risks it all to board a troubled gas tanker at sea, and it is feared that a farmer may have sustained serious internal injuries after being kicked by a horse.
A car of teenagers has rolled in a remote paddock, a fisherman mistakes chest pain for seasickness, and a tourist is hurt when a branch weighing more than a ton crashes down on him.

Documentary telling the complete story of Berlin's 1936 games - the early plans, the Nazi takeover, the purge of Jews from German athletics and the grand spectacle itself. (2016)
Frontier drama with Stephen McNally. Trouble looms in a sun-blazed town when an exiled gambler returns to warn of an impending Apache raid. Can the residents - good and bad - stand together? (1951)
